title: Corporate sales, profit growth accelerate in Q1: BOK
summary: Korean companies' sales and profitability improved in the first quarter of the year, driven by strong performances in the semiconductor, transportation and other industries, central bank data showed…
body: Tuesday. Corporate sales spiked 13.5 percent in the January-March period from three months earlier, accelerating from the previous quarter's 2.5 percent gain, according to the data from the Bank of Korea (BOK). The data is based on a review of 26,067 companies subject to external audits.…
